scripts.update-sw-hash: node -e "const {createHash} = require('crypto'); const fs = require('fs'); const wasmPath = 'public/wasm/gosqlx.wasm'; if (!fs.existsSync(wasmPath)) { console.log('WASM not found, skipping SW cache key update'); process.exit(0); } const hash = createHash('sha256').update(fs.readFileSync(wasmPath)).digest('hex').slice(0,8); const sw = fs.readFileSync('public/wasm-sw.js','utf8').replace(/gosqlx-wasm-[a-f0-9-]+/, 'gosqlx-wasm-' + hash); fs.writeFileSync('public/wasm-sw.js', sw); console.log('SW cache key updated to: gosqlx-wasm-' + hash);"
